title: JOANLAB Mini Magnetic Stir Plate Lab Stirrer Mixer with Stirrer Bar, Laboratory Magnetic Stirrer Mixer Plate 3000ml
description:
SMALL SIZE, LARGE CAPACITY – takes up far less space than other models, easily tucked away when not in use. Saving work space for you.
PORTABLE FOR WIDE USE-Ideal for stirring in scientific research, industry, agriculture, health and medicine, homebrew, like brew yeast starters,wine making,Juice mixing and etc;
JOANLAB magnetic stirrer is mainly used fir stirring the low viscosity liquid or solid-liquid mixture.Not suitable for highly viscous solutions.
BIG CAPACITY: This magnetic mixer has the maximum of 3000ml
【Excellent After-sales Protection】We back the lab magnetic stirrer plate with a 1 Year Warranty.Any question, please contact us at the first time, we are here to serve you!
reviews_5s:
Simple and straight forward this works great when I put the magnetic pellet in a decanter and “spin” my wines. Opens them up quickly and allows them to aerate and breathe so even young wines are approachable. Novel way to use this device but works perfectly! Cheers!I bought this to mix various solutions and coral food I use routinely in the reef aquarium hobby. It works great and is a lot faster and more fun than mixing manually. My kids, in particular, love watching it work which has provided me with great opportunities to teach them about water chemistry, etc.

Highly recommend.Bought this unit after returning a competitor model that ceased working after only 9/10 uses. So far this model has performed well after 9 or 10 uses. A little noisy (hum) when compared to previous model bought but still working well. Fingers crossed.I purchased this stirrer for my oldest adult son. He’s a double quadruple amputee, a result of an unfortunate set of circumstances with a wood chipper. One thing he did not lose though is his love of coffee. Unfortunately, he was in noble to stir his coffee. This stirrer makes the us ask seem effortless to him. And he’ll sit there for hours watching it stir as he tries to figure out how to turn it off and pick up the cup when alone.
Highly recommend.Play Video
[New]
The seller did reach out and assisted with my issues. Good customer service.

[OLD]
I bought this for its small size but its not usable. Half the time it doesn't move the bar and when it goes, the bar gets flung off the plate. (which the bar is now lost).
It sounds like its off balance as when its on, its louder than it should be.This is not a temperatures controlled unit. And when I ordered it I wasn’t looking for that. This is a really good mag mixer. It works better than my heated ones. Highly recommend it.Pleasantly surprised, it's exactly what i needed for my brewing needsLove it, just wish it came with some magnetic stirrers...I purchased this item to use as my metallic ink stirrer for my calligraphy work. I ABSOLUTELY love the product! It works perfectly for what I need it. I did purchase additional smaller magnetic pills but that is simply because I use small containers for my ink. Would highly recommend. Aesthetically looks pleasing to the eye as well! ❤️I'm using this for pool chemical checks. It is really fast, I have to be careful to slowly turn it on and keep it at the lowest setting. It has held up to my sloppy pouring, so I'd say it's slightly water resistant. Working perfectly so far. Knock on wood!
reviews_1s: Worked great the first 3 times I used it. Now it now longer is able to spin the magnet. Buy a more reputable brand or you’ll end up wasting your money.Couldn’t Keep Up. Returned it.Way too expensive for cheap quality, broke way too quick within a week, was so, so busy wasn't able to return within the open window time frame. Advise not to buy.Worked fine for a week. Now it does nothing at all. Waste of time and money.Does not work as advertised, unless of course your cup is emptyWon't stir, doesn't work. Broken out of the box. Disappointing.
